Creative.description: An ad creative — one record per Meta creative_id, holding image/video assets, narrative copy (headline, body, description, CTA, link), Instagram actor, and Shopify product_set linkage
assumptions: object_story_spec.link_data.* and object_story_spec.video_data.* are mutually exclusive per creative — link_data populated for image link ads, video_data for video ads
effective_object_story_id resolves to the actual published page post and is the stable cross-platform identifier

CreativeVariant.description: Multi-asset DCO variants (titles, bodies, descriptions, images, videos, CTAs, ad_formats, link_urls) generated from asset_feed_spec. One Creative → N variants. Used by Meta to combinatorially serve different headline × body × image combinations
assumptions: Meta does not expose stable variant IDs — variants are identified positionally via _dlt_list_idx within the parent creative
CDM should unpivot these into a single CreativeVariant entity with a variant_kind discriminator
Meta does not expose per-variant performance — the variant_kind dimension is a description of what was served, not an attribution unit

CreativeProductRef.description: Shopify catalog references attached to a creative — product set, storefront shop id, individual retailer item ids. The bridge from creative → product catalog
assumptions: creative_id is derived by walking _dlt_parent_id back to adcreatives._dlt_id
product_id can be details_page_product_id (single product) or a value from retailer_item_ids[] (carousel/template ads)

CreativeFeatureFlag.description: Advantage+ and DCO feature enrollment status per creative — derived from the ~33 degrees_of_freedom_spec__creative_features_spec__*__enroll_status columns on adcreatives

tables.transform: unpivot enroll_status columns to (creative_id, feature_name, enroll_status) rows

assumptions: Source columns are wide (one column per feature) — CDM materialization requires unpivot in create-transformation step
feature_name is derived by stripping the degrees_of_freedom_spec__creative_features_spec__ prefix and __enroll_status suffix

AdPerformance.description: Daily ad performance fact at (ad_id, date, device_platform) grain — impressions, spend, clicks, reach, frequency, ctr, cpc, cpm, inline link clicks, unique clicks. Carries denormalized campaign/adset/ad/account names and ids
assumptions: All numeric metrics are typed as text in source — CDM must cast to numeric in create-transformation
device_platform is the only breakdown currently configured; adding more (publisher_platform, country, product_id) would expand the grain

ConversionEvent.description: Per-action-type conversion events attributed to an ad/day/breakdown. Carries event count + attribution windows (1d_view, 1d_click, 7d_click) and (where applicable) monetary value
assumptions: actions and action_values share the same (ad_id, date, action_type) grain but are stored separately by Meta — CDM should join them so each ConversionEvent row carries both count and value

AttributedROAS.description: Purchase ROAS at (ad_id, date, device_platform, action_type) grain with attribution window splits — omni-channel and website (pixel) variants
assumptions: value column is the ROAS ratio (revenue / spend), not raw revenue — must NOT sum-aggregate; recompute as SUM(revenue)/NULLIF(SUM(spend),0) at query time
Pixel-only website_purchase_roas is typically <= omni purchase_roas; comparing the two surfaces attribution-channel divergence

Ad.description: An individual Meta ad — currently only present as denormalized (ad_id, ad_name) on ads_insights. No standalone source table in this pipeline

tables.transform: SELECT DISTINCT ad_id, ad_name FROM ads_insights

assumptions: GAP: no creative_id on ads_insights — Ad ↔ Creative bridge is missing. Recommended fix: add /ads endpoint via /new-endpoint to pull (id, creative.id, adset_id, campaign_id, status, effective_status). Without this, AdPerformance cannot join to Creative
Until the /ads endpoint is added, Ad is materialized as a thin dim from DISTINCT(ad_id, ad_name) on ads_insights

AdSet.description: Ad set / line item — denormalized as (adset_id, adset_name) on ads_insights. No targeting / budget fields available without an /adsets endpoint

tables.transform: SELECT DISTINCT adset_id, adset_name FROM ads_insights

assumptions: No targeting, budget, or schedule attributes available in the POC — would require /adsets endpoint

Campaign.description: Campaign — denormalized as (campaign_id, campaign_name) on ads_insights. No objective / budget / status fields available without a /campaigns endpoint

tables.transform: SELECT DISTINCT campaign_id, campaign_name FROM ads_insights

assumptions: No objective, budget, or status attributes available in the POC — would require /campaigns endpoint

AdAccount.description: Meta ad account — denormalized as (account_id, account_name) on ads_insights and adcreatives

_outstanding_work.description: Add /ads endpoint to facebook_marketing pipeline (fields: id, creative.id, adset_id, campaign_id, status, effective_status). Required to bridge AdPerformance.ad_id → Creative.id
Unpivot adcreatives.degrees_of_freedom_spec__creative_features_spec__*__enroll_status columns into a long-form CreativeFeatureFlag table (creative_id, feature_name, enroll_status)
Cast text-typed numeric metrics on ads_insights (impressions, spend, clicks, reach, frequency, cpc, cpm, ctr, inline_link_clicks, inline_link_click_ctr, unique_clicks) to numeric types
Join ads_insights__actions and ads_insights__action_values on (parent_id, action_type) so each ConversionEvent row carries both count and value
